embeddingText: Website scaffold for other mining and quarrying businesses in Sweden, focused on mineral extraction, aggregates, industrial materials, site operations, logistics, delivery, pickup, trust, contact and location information.
llmClassificationHints: Fits companies extracting, handling or supplying mineral-based raw materials rather than general local services.
Prefer routes for materials and operations over generic services when the business sells extracted materials.
Contact, location and practical delivery information are central conversion needs for this industry.
